name: YAOC2 Sandbox — OpenCTI Sync
description: Sandbox workflow for syncing observables or indicators directly to OpenCTI. Used when the source is not MISP (e.g. manual analyst entry or Shuffle playbook result).

nodes.name: Entry (Execute Workflow Trigger)
nodes.notes: Receives: { observable_type, observable_value, tlp_level, confidence, tags[] }

nodes.name: Validate Parameters (Code)
nodes.notes: Whitelist observable_type. Validate TLP level (white/green/amber/red). Clamp confidence to 0-100.

nodes.name: Upsert Observable in OpenCTI (HTTP Request)
nodes.notes: POST GraphQL to {{ $env.OPENCTI_BASE_URL }}/graphql. Use stixCyberObservableAdd mutation. Auth: Bearer {{ $env.OPENCTI_API_KEY }}.
